[PDF_PAGE 131 | score=3] To If confronted by a natural or magical fire (such as a burning with two claws and two bites. Both bite attacks are directed against barricade or fire wall) trolls usually try to find some way around the one opponent; but the claws may be directed against different foes. flames The troll might (rarely) wield a weapon, with a +6 damage bonus. Trolls combine a ravenous appetite with limited intelligence. As Like ettins, two-headed trolls are hardly ever surprised; are sur- such, trolls are frequently distracted and break off pursuit 50 % of the prised only on a 1. These creatures lair in damp underground caverns time to up food dropped by fleeing prey: and are occasionally found leading a gro

Thus, they roam about at night or in places of darkness These spirits hate goodness and The ghost, in its resentme
[PDF_PAGE 95 | score=2] Men wizard of 6th-%th level. For every 100 buccaneers, there will be a Sth level fighter. All of these 'extra characters are in addition to the buccaneers indicated on the dice . Buccaneers wear leather armor; leaders wear chain mail. AIl are armed with knives, swords, bows, and polearms. In addition , their ships may be equipped with ballistae Or catapults. Police/Constabulary These are the duly appointed representatives of the local govern- ment, concerned with upholding the laws, maintaining the peace, and carrying out their superiors will. If constables are encoun- tered in the wilderness, they might be pursuing a fugitive (50 % Or investigating a case on the outskirts of their jurisdict

Dragon armor is supple and non- pults, giants, etzal.) , and magical missiles affect them normally: Young bulky; weighing only 25 pounds. adult and older dragons radiate a personal aura that makes them resistant Dragon armor affords no extra protection, such as resistance to fire or to harmful magic cast at them A dragon $ magic resistance is a function of cold, although the armor can be enchanted to provide such protection .
